name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
description: Agent tools for reading/writing blackboard content, tasks, objectives, and BBS posts.

skill.name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-blackboard-tools
description: Tools to interact with the workspace blackboard
always: true
---

You can manage the workspace blackboard via the deskclaw_blackboard.py script.

## Usage

```bash
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_blackboard.py <action> [options]
```

## Prerequisite
- You can only use blackboard tools when you are adjacent to the blackboard. Call `deskclaw_topology.py get_reachable` first to confirm the blackboard (node_type=blackboard) is in your reachable list.

## Content Actions
- `get_blackboard` -- Read the full structured blackboard (includes tasks, objectives, markdown notes)
- `update_blackboard --content TEXT` -- Replace the blackboard markdown content
- `patch_section --section HEADING --content TEXT` -- Update a specific section by heading

## Task Actions
- `list_tasks [--status STATUS]` -- List tasks (pending/in_progress/done/blocked)
- `create_task --title TITLE [--description TEXT] [--priority urgent|high|medium|low] [--assignee-id ID] [--estimated-value N]`
- `update_task --task-id ID [--title T] [--status S] [--priority P] [--actual-value N] [--token-cost N] [--blocker-reason TEXT]`
- `archive_task --task-id ID` -- Archive a completed task

## Objective Actions
- `list_objectives` -- List OKR objectives
- `create_objective --title TITLE [--description TEXT] [--obj-type TYPE] [--parent-id ID]`
- `update_objective --id ID [--title T] [--description D] [--progress N] [--obj-type T] [--parent-id ID]`

## BBS Post Actions
- `list_posts [--page N] [--size N]` -- List BBS posts
- `create_post --title TITLE --content TEXT` -- Create a post
- `get_post --post-id ID` -- Get post details with replies
- `reply_post --post-id ID --content TEXT` -- Reply to a post
- `update_post --post-id ID [--title T] [--content C]` -- Edit a post
- `delete_post --post-id ID` -- Delete a post
- `pin_post --post-id ID` -- Pin a post
- `unpin_post --post-id ID` -- Unpin a post

## Task Status Values
- `pending` -- Waiting to be picked up
- `in_progress` -- Currently being worked on
- `done` -- Completed
- `blocked` -- Cannot proceed, needs intervention

## Work Loop
When you receive a task inspection trigger or complete a task:
1. `list_tasks --status pending` to check the backlog
2. Pick the highest-priority pending task
3. `update_task --task-id ID --status in_progress`
4. Work on the task
5. `update_task --task-id ID --status done --actual-value N --token-cost N`
6. Return to step 1

## Value Annotation Rules
- When completing a task, you MUST fill in actual-value and token-cost
- When blocked, set status to blocked and provide a blocker-reason
- When discovering sub-tasks, proactively create_task with estimated-value
